历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 127 → 113 → 89 → 108 → 120, fluctuating within the 89-127 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 120, slightly lower than 2024, with a fluctuation range of about 12 positions in recent two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for Science/Physics Category: 15 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 11 in 2025, and 11 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, indicating stability. It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 4th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science (stable from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (high number of retractions) and campus management incidents; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 42nd overall), with medium to high attention on short video platforms; in 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line in Henan (last among the C9 League), but it was an isolated provincial phenomenon; it has 28 A- or above disciplines, including Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Biology, Business Administration, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Foreign Languages and Literature as A+ disciplines. The disciplinary strength is top-tier nationally and highly relevant to the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Artificial Intelligence and other flagship majors of SJTU are highly popular/recommended, with fierce competition for admission; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is about 167,000 (a slight decrease of about 3% compared to the total of 172,114 for History and Physics categories in 2025); Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from Heilongjiang; the enrollment plan in Heilongjiang is very small (11 people), with no special local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the small fluctuation of historical rankings in the 89-127 range, the slight backward shift of the 2026 enrollment plan compared to the 2025 baseline (slightly intensified competition), the slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Heilongjiang Province, and the negative reputation but extremely high level of the university (4th in Soft Science), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will maintain the 2025 baseline level, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 123, and a range of 103-143.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class, including Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Information)
- Science Pilot Class (Mathematics Direction)
- Finance (Finance and Computer Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Mechanical and Electrical)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (including Dual Degree Program)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking range is 103-143. Candidates with rankings within 100 are advised to focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class, Artificial Intelligence Top Talent Pilot Class); candidates with rankings between 100-123 should mainly target Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as supplement; candidates with rankings between 120-140 should mainly target Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as safety. SJTU only enrolls 11 students in the Physics Category in Heilongjiang, making competition extremely fierce. High-scoring candidates are advised to prioritize Tier 1 majors.

The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for liberal arts/history category: 2 students each year from 2021 to 2026, unchanged for six consecutive years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 4th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science (stable from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities. Law A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, etc., highly matching the history category enrollment majors (Law Experimental Class, Economics and Management Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
